Match List-I with List-II and select the correct answer using the codes given below the lists:

Correct answer: B
Solution

• Merge sort used divide and conquer.
• Prim’s and Dijkstra’s algorithm both are used greedy algorithm.
• All pair shortest path uses dynamic programming.

Q19 MCQ Not checked
Technical • Data Science and artificial Intelligence • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which of the following statements is/are correct?
S1 : Given an max-heap of height Ο(log n) it will take Ο(n) time to delete the root element of the max heap.
S2 : In quick sort at first iteration, no element change its position iff given input is already sorted.

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Given a max-heap of height Ο(log n) to delete root if set Ο(n) time, heap property is not maintained, to maintain heap property Ο(log n) time required, total time Ο(log n).

Q25 MCQ Not checked
Technical • Data Science and artificial Intelligence • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which of the following statements are true?
S1 : Time complexity to construct binary heap of n elements by inserting elements is θ(n log n).
S2: A label binary tree can be uniquely constructed using the level order with inorder traversals.

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
S1 : Because build heap method take Ο(n).
S2: Combination with inorder and level order we can construct unique binary tree.

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
S2: Inplace merge sort on array will take Ο(n2) time.
